2603.18815.title: ProRL Agent: Rollout-as-a-Service for RL Training of Multi-Turn LLM Agents
2603.18815.paper_summary: Multi-turn LLM agents are increasingly important for solving complex, interactive tasks, and reinforcement learning (RL) is a key ingredient for improving their long-horizon behavior. However, RL training requires generating large numbers of sandboxed rollout trajectories, and existing infrastructures often couple rollout orchestration with the training loop, making systems hard to migrate and maintain. Under the rollout-as-a-service philosophy, we present ProRL Agent , a scalable infrastructure that serves the full agentic rollout lifecycle through an API service. ProRL Agent also provides standardized and extensible sandbox environments that support diverse agentic tasks in rootless HPC settings. We validate ProRL Agent through RL training on software engineering, math, STEM, and coding tasks. ProRL Agent is open-sourced and integrated as part of NVIDIA NeMo Gym.
2603.18815.paper_summary_zh: 多回合 LLM 代理在解決複雜的互動任務中變得越來越重要，而強化學習 (RL) 是改善其長期行為的關鍵成分。<lb/>然而，RL 訓練需要生成大量的沙盒回合軌跡，現有的基礎設施通常將回合協調與訓練循環相結合，使得系統難以遷移和維護。<lb/>在回合即服務的理念下，我們提出了 ProRL Agent，一個可擴展的基礎設施，通過 API 服務提供完整的代理回合生命周期。<lb/>ProRL Agent 還提供標準化和可擴展的沙盒環境，支持在無根 HPC 設置中進行多樣的代理任務。<lb/>我們通過在軟體工程、數學、STEM 和編碼任務上的 RL 訓練來驗證 ProRL Agent。<lb/>ProRL Agent 是開源的，並作為 NVIDIA NeMo Gym 的一部分進行整合。
2603.18815.author: Hao Zhang et.al.
2603.18815.authors: Hao Zhang, Mingjie Liu, Shaokun Zhang, Songyang Han, Jian Hu, Zhenghui Jin, Yuchi Zhang, Shizhe Diao, Ximing Lu, Binfeng Xu, Zhiding Yu, Jan Kautz, Yi Dong
